query: CHP olağanüstü kurultay çağrı heyeti Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi başvuru karar - latest status as of late June / early July 2026. Has Özgür Özel's team filed the application under Civil Code Art 75 requesting appointment of a 3-person çağrı heyeti to convene a CHP extraordinary congress? Has any court issued a decision?
answer:
## Research Complete

**Direct answer to the question:** As of late June / early-to-mid July 2026, **no — Özgür Özel's team had NOT filed the çağrı heyeti application to the Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi under Civil Code Art. 75, and no court had issued any decision on it.**

### Key findings:
1. **The application was announced but repeatedly postponed.** The filing was publicly slated for **29 June 2026**, but on that very day Özel's legal advisor **Gül Çiftçi told Odatv**: *"we will not make an application yet"* ("henüz bir başvuru yapmayacağız"), citing unresolved "technical matters."

2. **As of 9 July 2026**, reporting still used future/expectation tense — the application remained unfiled, and the strategic timeline shifted to **~20–21 July 2026**, tied to an expected **Yargıtay (Court of Cassation)** ruling before the judicial recess.

3. **No Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi decision exists** on the çağrı heyeti because the Art. 75 application was never submitted.

4. **A separate, unrelated petition** (a citizen's "karar açıklaması" request about the underlying 21 May "mutlak butlan" ruling) was rejected by the İstinaf court on **26 June 2026** — this is often confused with the çağrı heyeti matter but is legally distinct.

5. **Context:** The mechanism sought was the standard Civil Code Art. 75 route — asking a Civil Court of Peace judge to appoint a **3-person call committee** to convene the congress within ~45 days, backed by **833 notarized delegate signatures** (CHP HQ counted only ~820 valid).

The structured output has been submitted with all key facts, sources (10 Turkish news outlets), and quantitative data points.

sources.title: CHP'de gündem kurultay için 'çağrı heyeti'... Başvuru bugün denilmişti ama... Gül Çiftçi Odatv'ye anlattı
sources.snippet: Özel'in hukukçu kurmayı Gül Çiftçi: 'Kurultay için teknik bazı hususlar oluşuyor. O aşamaya gelinmediği için henüz bir başvuru yapmayacağız.'

sources.title: Özgür Özel önce CHP'ye kayyum isteyecek sonra bölecek: 21 Temmuz'dan sonra mutlak kopuş
sources.snippet: As of 9 July, application not yet filed; expected first to apply to sulh hukuk mahkemesi; timeline set to ~20 July tied to Yargıtay decision.

sources.title: CHP'de kurultay krizi mahkemede
sources.snippet: Özel'e destek veren ekip bugün sulh hukuk mahkemesinden partiye çağrı heyeti atanmasını talep edecek; kabul edilirse CHP en geç 45 gün içinde olağanüstü kurultaya gidecek.

sources.title: CHP Genel Merkezi 'olağan takvim' demişti! Özel kanadı 'çağrı heyeti' isteyecek
sources.snippet: Genel Merkez geçerli imza sayısını 820 olarak duyururken, Özel cephesi mahkeme kanalıyla çağrı heyeti istemek için harekete geçiyor.

sources.title: İstinaf CHP için yapılan olağanüstü kurultay talebini reddetti
sources.snippet: 26 June 2026: İstinaf rejected a 'kararın açıklanması' petition; found no ambiguity and that the applicant was not a party to the case.

sources.title: Mahkemeden CHP'nin kurultay başvurusuna yanıt
sources.snippet: 21 May UYAP-loaded 'mutlak butlan' ruling by Ankara BAM 36th Civil Chamber; 18 June petition by Tülin Apak re: butlan clarification.

sources.title: Kritik tarih 26 Haziran... Kılıçdaroğlu yönetimine tanınan süre doluyor
sources.snippet: 833 notarized delegate signatures; deadline for the leadership to act expired 26 June 2026.

sources.title: Özel'e yakın kurmaylar yeni parti için 20 Temmuz'u işaret ediyor
sources.snippet: Özel-aligned sources await a Yargıtay decision before judicial recess; sulh hukuk mahkemesi application possible if no congress call; 20 July framed as 'kopuş' threshold.

sources.title: CHP'de karar haftası
sources.snippet: 833 signatures delivered; 10-day deadline to headquarters expired Friday; leadership reports 820 valid signatures under review, no response yet.

sources.title: CHP'de Tarihi Bölünme Resti: '21 Temmuz'da 100 Milletvekiliyle Yeni Oluşum Başlatabiliriz'
sources.snippet: CHP Aydın MP Süleyman Bülbül: if Yargıtay rules against Özel, new political movement with ~100 MPs from 21 July.

key_facts: As of early-to-mid July 2026, Özgür Özel's team had NOT yet filed the çağrı heyeti application to the Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi under Civil Code Art. 75.
No court (Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi) had issued any decision on a çağrı heyeti appointment, because the application had not been filed.

The filing was originally announced for 29 June 2026 but was postponed; Özel's legal advisor Gül Çiftçi (Odatv, 29 June) said 'henüz bir başvuru yapmayacağız' ('we will not make an application yet') due to unresolved 'technical matters'.
On 21 May 2026 the Ankara Bölge Adliye Mahkemesi 36th Civil Chamber issued a 'mutlak butlan' (absolute nullity) ruling removing Özgür Özel and restoring Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu as CHP leader.
Özel-aligned delegates collected 833 notarized signatures for an extraordinary congress; the Genel Merkez said only ~820 were valid after disciplinary referrals/withdrawals.
A 10-day deadline to the Kılıçdaroğlu leadership to convene a congress expired around 26 June 2026 with no congress call issued.
Under Civil Code Art. 75, applicants can ask a Civil Court of Peace judge to appoint a 3-person 'çağrı heyeti' (call committee); if granted, a congress would follow within ~45 days.

As of 9 July 2026, reporting still used future/expectation tense; the strategic focus shifted to a ~20–21 July 2026 threshold tied to a pending Yargıtay (Court of Cassation) ruling before the judicial recess (adli tatil).

A SEPARATE petition — a citizen's (Tülin Apak) 'karar açıklaması' request regarding the butlan ruling, filed ~18 June — was rejected by the İstinaf court on 26 June 2026 for no ambiguity and lack of standing; this is not the çağrı heyeti application.
By July, Özel/İmamoğlu-aligned figures (e.g., MP Süleyman Bülbül) increasingly signaled potential new-party formation after 20 July 2026 if the Yargıtay ruled against them.

data_points.metric: Notarized delegate signatures collected for extraordinary congress
Valid signatures per CHP Genel Merkez after disciplinary referrals/withdrawals
Requested size of court-appointed çağrı heyeti (call committee) under Civil Code Art. 75
Maximum days to congress if çağrı heyeti request granted
Deadline given to Kılıçdaroğlu leadership to convene congress
MPs Özel-aligned camp claims could form new movement from 21 July
